qa_pair.question: Using sales_orders.csv, how many total orders are in the dataset?
Using sales_orders.csv, what is the total number of units sold across all orders?
Using sales_orders.csv, which region has the highest total net revenue (units * unit_price * (1 - discount_pct))?
Using sales_orders.csv, what is the average discount_pct rounded to 4 decimals?
Using sales_orders.csv, which product has the highest total units sold?
Using sales_orders.csv, what is total net revenue for product Laptop rounded to 2 decimals?
Using sales_orders.csv, how many orders were placed through the Online channel?
Using support_tickets.jsonl, how many tickets are currently open?
Using support_tickets.jsonl, what is the average resolution_hours for closed tickets rounded to 2 decimals?
Using support_tickets.jsonl, how many tickets are both critical priority and still open?
